title: Spotify’s AI DJ now supports French, German, Italian and Brazilian Portuguese
summary: Spotify has expanded its AI DJ feature to support French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese. This expansion extends the AI-powered music curation service to additional international markets.
content: Spotify's AI DJ feature now supports French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese.

zh.title: Spotify的AI DJ现在支持法语、德语、意大利语和巴西葡萄牙语
zh.summary: Spotify已将其AI DJ功能扩展到支持法语、德语、意大利语和巴西葡萄牙语。这一扩展将该AI驱动的音乐策划服务扩展到了更多国际市场。

title: Is your Porsche Taycan too slow at the Nürbugring? You need this Manthey Kit.
summary: Manthey, a Nürburgring specialist, has developed an upgrade package for the Porsche Taycan EV to improve performance on the challenging track. The kit aims to demonstrate electric vehicles can compete with traditional performance vehicles on established automotive benchmarks.
content: Nordschleife-specialist Manthey has developed an upgrade package for the Porsche EV.

zh.title: 你的保时捷Taycan在纽博格林太慢了吗？你需要这个Manthey套件
zh.summary: Manthey是一家纽博格林专家公司，为保时捷Taycan电动车开发了一个升级包，以改善其在这条挑战性赛道上的性能。该套件旨在证明电动车可以在既定的汽车基准上与传统高性能车辆竞争。

title: Former NASA chief takes helm of national security space firm
summary: A former NASA chief has assumed leadership of a national security-focused space firm. The company specializes in spacecraft technology, including in-orbit refueling capabilities for extending operational lifespans.
content: "The spacecraft can also be refueled, and it can refuel others."

zh.title: 前NASA首席官员担任国家安全太空公司的掌舵人
zh.summary: 前NASA首席官员已担任一家专注于国家安全的太空公司的领导职务。该公司专门从事航天器技术，包括用于延长运营寿命的在轨加油能力。

title: Five architects of the AI economy explain where the wheels are coming off
summary: Industry leaders discuss critical challenges in the AI supply chain, including chip shortages and potential architectural flaws, at the Milken Global Conference.
content: Earlier this week, five people who touch every layer of the AI supply chain sat down at the Milken Global Conference in Beverly Hills, where they talked with TechCrunch about everything from chip shortages to orbital data centers to the possibility that the whole architecture that undergirds the tech is wrong.

zh.title: 五位AI经济架构师解释问题所在
zh.summary: 行业领袖在米尔肯全球会议上讨论AI供应链的关键挑战，包括芯片短缺和潜在的架构缺陷。
